updates.title: Form 26AS replaced with Form 168: What changes for taxpayers under the new Income Tax Act, 2025?
updates.summary: Form 26AS, used for taxes verification, will be replaced by the new Form 168 under the Income Tax Act, 2025. This auto-generated statement will provide comprehensive tax-related information starting from the 2026-27 tax year. Details here.

updates.summary: The income tax filing season has begun, allowing online submissions for ITR-1, ITR-2, and ITR-4. Taxpayers are advised to wait until mid-June for Form 16. Here are the changes in the income tax forms.

updates.title: Can your health claim be rejected? IRDAI’s 5‑year moratorium rule explained
